features.title: Rename coherence to internal_consistency across all 6 base framework files
features.description: Atomic rename of the Authenticity Gate dimension 'coherence' to 'internal_consistency' in SKILL.md, patterns.md, agents/generator.md, roles/generator.md, agents/evaluator.md, and roles/evaluator.md. Includes removing 3 disambiguation notes that are no longer needed after the rename.
features.source_requirement: spec.md Shipped Scope - v0.9.1 patch rename
steps: Verify all 6 target files exist in the plugin tree
In SKILL.md (~line 372): confirm 'coherence' dimension renamed to 'internal_consistency' and disambiguation note removed
In patterns.md NN-evaluation.json schema (~line 258): confirm JSON key 'coherence' renamed to 'internal_consistency'
In patterns.md NN-builder-report.md template (~line 441): confirm '**Coherence**' renamed to '**Internal consistency**'
In agents/generator.md (~line 33): confirm '**Coherence**' renamed to '**Internal consistency**'
In roles/generator.md (~line 45): confirm '**Coherence**' renamed to '**Internal consistency**'
In agents/evaluator.md (~line 94): confirm '**coherence**' renamed to '**internal_consistency**' and disambiguation note at ~line 104 removed
In roles/evaluator.md (~line 83): confirm 'coherence' renamed to 'internal_consistency' and disambiguation instruction at ~line 89 removed
Grep all 6 files for 'coherence' in dimension-name contexts and confirm zero hits (prose references to the concept are acceptable)
features.notes: All edits are text substitutions. No logic changes, no new sections. Domain skill files (harness-ea, harness-sdlc, etc.) must NOT be touched.
